name: Pi Mai Lao (Lao New Year)
traditions: Water splashing; sand stupa building at temples; bathing Buddha images; baci ceremony; releasing birds and fish.
historicalBackground: Pi Mai Lao is the traditional Lao New Year, similar to Songkran but with unique Lao Buddhist ceremonies. It marks the beginning of the agricultural cycle.
description: Laos' gentle New Year celebration, where water rituals, temple visits, and the baci ceremony mark the renewal of the season.
